backtranslate.resultText:
future; to achieve the eight powers (siddhis) as <the one of>
assuming microscopic form (animā) and the <all> others.
There is no doubt about it. (23cd_25ab)
O my dear one, great goddess (Mahādevi), the seventh
cakra is as beautiful and auspicious as the full moon. If one
realizes it in the body it bestows both enjoyment and
emancipation. It enables one to destroy old age and death,
and to enter into other bodies. What else may not be possible?
Even one may become the best of all mankind. (25°d-27ab)

cards.source: The baker opened his shop before sunrise. He noticed that the old clock had stopped, but the bread still rose on time. By noon, neighbors came in worried about their own delays. He smiled and said that a steady hand matters more than a perfect clock.
cards.target: 제빵사는 해가 뜨기 전에 가게를 열었습니다. 그는 낡은 시계가 멈춘 것을 알아차렸지만, 빵은 여전히 제시간에 솟아올랐다. 정오가 되자 이웃들이 늦어질 것을 걱정하며 찾아왔습니다. 그는 완벽한 시계보다 꾸준한 손길이 더 중요하다고 웃으며 말했다.
cards.fingerprint: the baker opened his shop before sunrise. he noticed that the old clock had stopped, but the bread still rose on time. by noon, neighbors came in worried about their own delays. he smiled and said that a steady hand matters more than a perfect clock.

cards.source: A narrow bridge crossed the river behind the school. Each day, two students passed without speaking. One afternoon, the rain made the boards slippery, and one student offered a hand. After that, the bridge was still quiet, but it no longer felt lonely.
cards.target: 좁은 다리가 학교 뒤의 강을 건넜다. 매일 두 명의 학생이 말없이 지나갔다. 어느 날 오후, 비가 내리면서 보드가 미끄러워졌고 한 학생이 손을 내밀었습니다. 그 후 다리는 여전히 고요했지만 더 이상 외롭지 않았다.
cards.fingerprint: a narrow bridge crossed the river behind the school. each day, two students passed without speaking. one afternoon, the rain made the boards slippery, and one student offered a hand. after that, the bridge was still quiet, but it no longer felt lonely.

cards.source: Only one mango remained on the table. The siblings both wanted it and both pretended not to. Their grandmother cut it into thin slices and placed them on one plate. They learned that sharing did not make the fruit smaller; it made the afternoon larger.
cards.target: 테이블 위에 망고 한 개만 남았다. 형제자매들은 둘 다 그것을 원했고, 둘 다 원하지 않는 척했다. 할머니는 얇게 썰어서 한 접시에 담으셨어요. 그들은 나눔이 열매를 작게 만드는 것이 아니라 오후를 더 크게 만든다는 것을 배웠습니다.
cards.fingerprint: only one mango remained on the table. the siblings both wanted it and both pretended not to. their grandmother cut it into thin slices and placed them on one plate. they learned that sharing did not make the fruit smaller; it made the afternoon larger.

cards.source: The map was old and missed three new roads. A traveler complained until a child pointed to the river. The river had not moved, and neither had the hills. The traveler followed what was still true and reached the town before dark.
cards.target: 지도는 오래되었고 세 개의 새로운 도로를 놓쳤습니다. 한 여행자가 아이가 강을 가리킬 때까지 불평했습니다. 강은 움직이지 않았고 언덕도 없었다. 나그네는 여전히 사실인 것을 따라 어두워지기 전에 마을에 도착했다.
cards.fingerprint: the map was old and missed three new roads. a traveler complained until a child pointed to the river. the river had not moved, and neither had the hills. the traveler followed what was still true and reached the town before dark.

cards.source: A seed fell beside a stone wall. It could not see the garden beyond the wall, but it could feel the morning rain. Slowly it sent roots into the dark soil. When spring came, its leaves rose high enough to see the garden for themselves.
cards.target: 돌담 옆에 씨앗이 떨어졌다. 벽 너머의 정원은 보이지 않았지만 아침 비는 느낄 수 있었다. 서서히 어두운 흙에 뿌리를 내렸다. 봄이 오면 잎사귀들은 정원을 직접 볼 수 있을 만큼 높이 솟아올랐다.
cards.fingerprint: a seed fell beside a stone wall. it could not see the garden beyond the wall, but it could feel the morning rain. slowly it sent roots into the dark soil. when spring came, its leaves rose high enough to see the garden for themselves.

cards.source: The merchant promised fair weights to every customer. One day, a rich buyer offered extra money for a false scale. The merchant refused and lost the sale. Years later, the town trusted his shop because his promise had cost him something.
cards.target: 매장은 모든 고객에게 공정한 가중치를 약속했습니다. 어느 날, 한 부유한 구매자가 가짜 규모로 추가 금액을 제안했습니다. 상인은 거절하고 판매를 잃었습니다. 몇 년 후, 마을은 그의 가게를 신뢰했습니다. 그의 약속에 뭔가 비용이 들었기 때문입니다.
cards.fingerprint: the merchant promised fair weights to every customer. one day, a rich buyer offered extra money for a false scale. the merchant refused and lost the sale. years later, the town trusted his shop because his promise had cost him something.

cards.source: A student complained that the classroom window was too small. The teacher asked him to describe one cloud in exact detail. The student looked carefully and filled a page. He learned that attention can enlarge even the smallest view.
cards.target: 한 학생이 교실 창문이 너무 작다고 불평했다. 선생님은 그에게 구름 한 개를 자세히 설명해 달라고 부탁했다. 학생은 주의 깊게 보고 한 페이지를 채웠다. 그는 작은 시야에도 관심이 커질 수 있다는 것을 배웠다.
cards.fingerprint: a student complained that the classroom window was too small. the teacher asked him to describe one cloud in exact detail. the student looked carefully and filled a page. he learned that attention can enlarge even the smallest view.

cards.source: A fisherman found a receipt floating near his boat. It listed rice, oil, and medicine, but no name. He carried it to the market and asked quietly. By evening, an old woman had her missing package back, and the fisherman had a new friend.
cards.target: 한 어부가 배 근처에 떠 있는 영수증을 발견했습니다. 쌀, 기름, 약을 나열했지만 이름은 없었습니다. 그는 그것을 들고 시장으로 가서 조용히 물었습니다. 저녁이 되자 한 노파는 잃어버린 짐을 되찾았고, 어부에게는 새로운 친구가 생겼습니다.
cards.fingerprint: a fisherman found a receipt floating near his boat. it listed rice, oil, and medicine, but no name. he carried it to the market and asked quietly. by evening, an old woman had her missing package back, and the fisherman had a new friend.

cards.source:
Lanterns fade above the rice.
Steam climbs from bowls and tea.
Coins ring softly in careful hands.
The day begins by feeding the street.
cards.target:
등불은 밥 위로 사라집니다.
그릇과 차에서 스팀을 타고 올라갑니다.
조심스럽게 손에 동전이 부드럽게 울립니다.
하루는 길거리에서 먹이를 주는 것으로 시작됩니다.
cards.fingerprint:
lanterns fade above the rice.
steam climbs from bowls and tea.
coins ring softly in careful hands.
the day begins by feeding the street.

cards.source:
The road keeps a silver memory.
Leaves shake light from their sleeves.
A child steps over a shining puddle.
The sky repairs itself in blue.
cards.target:
길은 은빛 기억을 간직하고 있습니다.
소매에서 빛을 흔드는 잎사귀.
한 아이가 빛나는 웅덩이를 밟습니다.
하늘은 파란색으로 수리를 합니다.
cards.fingerprint:
the road keeps a silver memory.
leaves shake light from their sleeves.
a child steps over a shining puddle.
the sky repairs itself in blue.

cards.source:
A knife rests beside green herbs.
Soup answers the quiet flame.
Someone hums without knowing the tune.
Home gathers around the spoon.
cards.target:
푸른 약초 옆에 칼이 놓여 있습니다.
수프가 조용한 불꽃에 답합니다.
누군가는 곡조를 모르고 콧노래를 흥얼거립니다.
숙소는 숟가락으로 둘러싸여 있습니다.
cards.fingerprint:
a knife rests beside green herbs.
soup answers the quiet flame.
someone hums without knowing the tune.
home gathers around the spoon.

cards.source:
Two voices lower, then meet.
The table keeps their open hands.
No one wins the room alone.
Peace signs its name in silence.
cards.target:
두 목소리가 낮아진 후, 만나세요.
테이블은 두 손을 벌리고 있습니다.
아무도 혼자서 방을 이길 수 없습니다.
평화는 조용히 그 이름에 서명합니다.
cards.fingerprint:
two voices lower, then meet.
the table keeps their open hands.
no one wins the room alone.
peace signs its name in silence.

cards.source:
The platform waits with yellow eyes.
Suitcases lean into goodbye.
A whistle cuts the evening clean.
Hope boards before the passengers.
cards.target:
플랫폼은 노란 눈으로 기다립니다.
여행 가방은 작별 인사에 몸을 맡깁니다.
호루라기가 저녁을 깨끗하게 자릅니다.
호프는 승객보다 먼저 탑승합니다.
cards.fingerprint:
the platform waits with yellow eyes.
suitcases lean into goodbye.
a whistle cuts the evening clean.
hope boards before the passengers.

cards.source:
Numbers sleep in narrow lines.
A careful thumb turns every page.
The debt of kindness has no column.
Still, the heart keeps perfect books.
cards.target:
숫자는 좁은 줄에서 잔다.
신중한 엄지손가락이 모든 페이지를 뒤집습니다.
친절의 빚에는 기둥이 없습니다.
그래도 마음은 완벽한 책을 간직합니다.
cards.fingerprint:
numbers sleep in narrow lines.
a careful thumb turns every page.
the debt of kindness has no column.
still, the heart keeps perfect books.

cards.source:
Glass catches the patient star.
Questions bloom under white light.
The answer waits without hurry.
Truth has learned to breathe slowly.
cards.target:
유리가 환자의 별을 잡습니다.
하얀 빛 아래 질문이 피어납니다.
대답은 서두르지 않고 기다립니다.
진실은 천천히 호흡하는 법을 배웠습니다.
cards.fingerprint:
glass catches the patient star.
questions bloom under white light.
the answer waits without hurry.
truth has learned to breathe slowly.

cards.source:
Every village folds flavor differently.
Pepper remembers one road.
Rice remembers another rain.
Together they call the traveler home.
cards.target:
마을마다 맛이 다릅니다.
후추는 한 길을 기억합니다.
쌀은 또 다른 비를 기억합니다.
그들은 함께 여행자를 집으로 부릅니다.
cards.fingerprint:
every village folds flavor differently.
pepper remembers one road.
rice remembers another rain.
together they call the traveler home.
